title: デビュー戦の後に・ここからが

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City's debut is a success. After the race, we
meet to discuss her future schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because her fans want to see her with the Triple
Tiara, she opts for working toward the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For her next goal, we pick a race that leads up to
that tour—the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies.
